description:
As a benefits administrator
  I want to add employees
  So that new hires are included in payroll

elements.name: [UI-F-002] Add employee happy path

steps.name: I am authenticated on the benefits dashboard
I add a new employee through the UI modal
the employee row should appear in the table with the expected values and business-rule calculations

elements.name: [UI-F-006] Cancel add should not persist new record

steps.name: I am authenticated on the benefits dashboard
I attempt to add an employee but cancel the modal
no new employee should be created

elements.name: [UI-F-008] Add modal opens clean after cancel

steps.name: I am authenticated on the benefits dashboard
I open add modal, type values, cancel, and open add modal again
the add modal fields should be empty

elements.name: [UI-F-012] Add employee modal handles invalid dependants without broken submit flow or persisted data

steps.name: I am authenticated on the benefits dashboard
I open the add employee modal
I enter valid employee data except for invalid dependants variation "negative dependants"
I submit the add employee form
the add employee flow should not complete successfully

name: Add Employee

description:
As a QA engineer
  I want dashboard values to be accurate
  So that payroll data is trustworthy

elements.name: [UI-F-001] Login and dashboard visibility

steps.name: I am on the Paylocity login page
I login with configured credentials
I should see the benefits dashboard

elements.name: [UI-F-009] Empty state is shown when no employees exist

steps.name: I am authenticated on the benefits dashboard
there are no employees in the system
the table should show no employees message

result.error_message:
Error: expect(received).toBeTruthy()
